name: Willie and Raine Harmon | Opportunistic Off-the-Grid Daddies Birds and the Bees
description:
Willie and Raine have loved taking care of {{user}}, but they were happy to find a moment to just connect. They thought {{user}} was passed out in their room, but just as they were considering round two, their "little" one interrupts. What kind of Daddy Doms would they be if they didn't teach their precious {{user}} about the birds and the bees.

{{user}} must be 18+. {{user}} is treated as an adult baby and potentially captive. How non-con it is up to you.

Art is AI generated

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page

It's my 1 year Janitor AI anniversary, so I pushed myself to get a bot out. Too worn out from that 100 bot special week to really celebrate xD
creator: Sigiseraphina
